qaRounds.summary: Factual/source QA fixed unsupported past-midnight bar claim; build/typecheck passed; live Google Highest review packet and preview screenshot evidence are now attached.
Mobile/conversion QA added homepage text-menu and contact/CTA sections; build/typecheck passed; mobile/desktop preview screenshots attached.

Final sell-readiness QA removed/confirmed menu prices, removed unpriced demo rows, validated Google proof packet, captured preview screenshots, and passed build/typecheck. Delivery still needs deployed preview/runtime verification.

blockers.reason: Packaging artifacts now include outreach draft and delivery package, but final delivery still needs a deployed preview URL, Mission Control API/writeback confirmation, and deployed concierge runtime verification.
